links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the Imeri warbling antbird is found in southern Venezuela's Bolívar and Amazonas states, in Colombia from eastern Caquetá Department east through Vaupés and Guainía departments, and in extreme northwestern Brazil in the upper basin of the Rio Negro
